actor_status.description: A grey-goo payload is dismantling this unit from the inside out. It reproduces just fast enough to keep destroying tissue and machinery and to eat through armor plating, at a rate set by its stack count. Left unchecked, it does not stop.
actor_status.strategy_tip_optional: Stacks. Each turn, deals health damage and strips a percentage of armor plating based on intensity. Stacks rarely shed on their own (15% chance per turn), so sustained exposure builds toward lethal instead of reaching equilibrium. When a target dies, half the payload spreads to nearby enemies and combines with any Grey Goo they already carry.

actor_status.description: Sacrificial nanobot mass held in surface reservoirs. While at least one charge is held, an incoming hit's physical damage is capped to a low flat amount, consuming a charge. One charge regrows per turn, up to the reservoir limit.
actor_status.strategy_tip_optional: Intensity is the number of charges currently held. Managed by the Active Ablative Nanobot Armor.

actor_status.description: This unit's nanobot colonies are primed by a nearby Reweave Catalyst: they knit faster and hold their patterns longer.
actor_status.strategy_tip_optional: Currently a marker; the grey-goo lifecycle reads it for enhanced effects.
